evidence: Just wonderful period piece. 4 episodes depicting the broke upper crust and arranged marriages to gain money in order to keep status quo.
Great story of two class systems. The little poverty stricken hamlet and the well to do town.
Great story telling. A small hamlet and a well to do town co-exist and cope with English Victorian life.
Nice little story of redemption after a life of wasted non effort

Brilliant writing and a great cast!
Great 60's period piece. Well written and acted with a good story line.

summary: The user has a strong preference for period dramas, particularly those with well-written narratives and high production quality. They appreciate character-driven stories with emotional depth and have a fondness for specific actors, indicating a loyalty to their performances.
